name: 2.3.3 - Irrigation Status Tool
description: Deterministic read-only irrigation status tool for Oom Sakkie. Reads backend irrigation status endpoint only. No hardware control.

parameters.content: Phase 10.3Q: deterministic read-only backend irrigation status. Calls /api/telemetry/irrigation/status only. No Google Sheets nodes, no IFTTT, no controller actions, no hardware control.
